scenarios.label: Sinistcha Trick Room redirection into fast offense
scenarios.validationGoal: Validate that Trick Room plus Rage Powder gives slow attackers a safe first tempo line into fast pressure.
scenarios.notes: Approved as internal tactical evidence only; not ladder or tournament proof.

scenarios.label: Sinistcha redirection support for setup pressure
scenarios.validationGoal: Validate that Rage Powder and Strength Sap preserve an ally's setup turn while reducing immediate physical pressure.
scenarios.notes: Approved as internal tactical evidence only; not ladder or tournament proof.

scenarios.label: Incineroar slow pivot against physical leads
scenarios.validationGoal: Validate that Intimidate, Fake Out, and Parting Shot create a stable pivot sequence for a slower partner.
scenarios.notes: Approved as internal tactical evidence only; not ladder or tournament proof.

scenarios.label: Togekiss redirection supporting Bloodmoon offense
scenarios.validationGoal: Validate that Follow Me gives Ursaluna-Bloodmoon a safe turn to apply special spread pressure into mixed offense.
scenarios.notes: Approved as internal tactical evidence only; not ladder or tournament proof.

scenarios.label: Muk-Alola special wall anchoring Trick Room turns
scenarios.validationGoal: Validate that Muk-Alola absorbs special pressure while Sinistcha establishes a safe support cycle.
scenarios.notes: Approved as internal tactical evidence only; not ladder or tournament proof.

scenarios.label: Aggron-Mega slow breaker through Intimidate cycles
scenarios.validationGoal: Validate that Aggron-Mega retains a reliable physical damage line while Incineroar controls attack power and positioning.
scenarios.notes: Approved as internal tactical evidence only; not ladder or tournament proof.

scenarios.label: Aggron-Mega Body Press behind redirection
scenarios.validationGoal: Validate that Follow Me creates enough space for Aggron-Mega to convert Defense into sustained Body Press pressure.
scenarios.notes: Approved as internal tactical evidence only; not ladder or tournament proof.

scenarios.label: Fast Incineroar Taunt against speed control
scenarios.validationGoal: Validate that a faster Taunt line denies opposing speed control long enough for Ursaluna-Bloodmoon to pressure the board.
scenarios.notes: Approved as internal tactical evidence only; not ladder or tournament proof.

scenarios.label: Muk-Alola special wall with redirection support
scenarios.validationGoal: Validate that Muk-Alola and Sinistcha can absorb special attacks and redirect targeted pressure while preserving endgame resources.
scenarios.notes: Approved as internal tactical evidence only; not ladder or tournament proof.
